title: French Cucumber Salad
description: A refreshing French-inspired salad made with cucumber, silky dressing, and a hint of xtra crunch.
instructions: 1. Peel and slice the cucumber into thin rounds.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the silky dressing and a pinch of Indian spice.
3. Add the sliced cucumber to the bowl and toss to coat with the dressing.
4. Sprinkle the xtra topping over the salad.
6. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
7. Garnish with additional xtra topping or fresh herbs, if desired.
